name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Shortly before serving time, measure flour into a bowl.
2. Grate potatoes on a very fine grater and add them to the bowl; stir in the rest of the ingredients.
3. Grease a medium skillet lightly.
4. Place the skillet over medium heat.
5. Drop the potato mixture by heaping tablespoons into the hot skillet.
6. Fry until crisp and golden brown on the underside.
7. Turn the pancakes over and fry the other side until crisp and golden brown.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve as a vegetable or as a luncheon or supper main dish with applesauce. Makes about 16 pancakes.
